notes: Market-neutral monthly XTI/XNG commodity-skewness basket from the approved FERNANDEZ-SKEW-2018_XTI_XNG_S01 card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX D1 host, computes each leg's Pearson skewness from completed D1 log returns in the prior 12 complete broker months, buys the lower-skew leg, and shorts the higher-skew leg. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
